title: [FABRIC] Shield Thorns
body:
This is my first published mod made without MCreator and I'm not a great programmer.

I'm also not a native english speaker, so if you have any feedback for this mod or its mod page please tell me in the comments.

#
As the title suggests, this mod makes the enchantment Thorns avaliable to use on shields. You can enchant a shield with Thorns by using a enchanted book of thorns on a shield with an anvil. Shields with Thorns applied will have a chance of reflecting damage upon the attacker if it is currently being used to block attacks. This mod is for Fabric 1.18.x and I talk about potentially making a forge version in this [youtube video](https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=X_8Nh5XfRw0&ab_channel=Demonz_Houze).

#
Bilibili demo of the mod for chinese users:(https://www.bilibili.com/video/BV1NT4y1y7Rb?spm_id_from=333.999.0.0)

 

这个MOD使荆棘附魔可以在盾牌上使用。

在铁砧上使用荆棘附魔书能将它附魔在盾牌上，附魔过的盾牌格挡时将有机会将伤害反射到攻击者身上。这个mod针对Fabric 1.18.x开发，Forge版本请移步[本视频](https://www.bilibili.com/video/BV1uT4y1P7CX?from=search)。
